mapper.insert: insert into goods(id, name, img, descr, specials, price, unit, store, category_id) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{img}, #{descr}, #{specials}, #{price}, #{unit}, #{store}, #{categoryId})
mapper.select: select category.name as name, count(*) as value from goods join category on goods.category_id = category.id group by category.name
